title: Plenty of Phish
relevance_summary: Phishing attack using CREATE2 opcode to deploy fresh contracts for each phished signature

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys a contract immediately after a signature request
prevention.trigger: CREATE2 opcode -> signature request in single tx

red_flags: Freshly approved address deployed and assets transferred within the same transaction
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that deploys a contract immediately after a signature request
summary: A phishing attack used CREATE2 opcode to deploy fresh contracts for each phished signature, allowing the scammer to bypass wallet security checks and steal funds. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for CREATE2 opcode usage immediately following a signature request.
